data.title: ASTHO partners with Veritas Data Research and HealthVerity to introduce a unique public health data consortium.
data.description: In Arlington, Virginia on February 19, 2026, the Association of State and Territorial Health Officials (ASTHO) revealed a groundbreaking collaboration with Veritas Data Research and HealthVerity to create a unique public health data consortium. This partnership marks the inception of the first consortium of its kind, aiming to revolutionize public health data collection and analysis.

data.title: First Capital, Inc. (NASDAQ: FCAP) annual meeting on May 18, 2026 in Corydon, Indiana. - 109 characters
data.description: On February 19, 2026, in Corydon, Indiana, First Capital, Inc. (NASDAQ:FCAP), the parent company of First Harrison Bank, revealed that their yearly stockholders' gathering is scheduled for May 18, 2026.

data.title: Middlesex Water Company 2025 earnings report: $42.8M net income, $96M invested in infrastructure, EPS $2.36, $506M planned investment 2026-2028.
data.description: Middlesex Water Company reported diluted earnings per share of $2.36 for 2025, invested $96 million in water and wastewater infrastructure in the same year, and plans to invest $506 million from 2026 to 2028. Operating revenues for 2025 were $194.7 million, with a net income of $42.8 million. The company declared a $0.36 per share common stock dividend. The New Jersey Board of Public Utilities approved an increase in annual operating revenues by $14.5 million, with new rates effective from February 23, 2026. Middlesex Water Company focuses on sustainable growth, infrastructure investment, and regulatory proceedings to provide reliable water utility service.

data.title: Live Nation surpasses estimates in Q4, with $6.31 billion revenue and a loss of 96 cents/share, beating expectations.
data.description: Live Nation Entertainment Inc (NYSE: LYV) released its fourth-quarter financial results, surpassing analyst expectations. The company reported revenue of $6.31 billion, beating estimates of $6.11 billion. Live Nation also reported a loss of 96 cents per share, surpassing expectations for a loss of $1.06 per share. This positive performance has driven Live Nation Entertainment stock to move upward following the announcement. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ground beef prices reach record $6.67 as US cattle herd drops to 1951 levels, up 20.5% in a year, 72% since 2020.
data.description: In January 2026, annual inflation rate decreased to 2.4%, with core inflation at 2.5%, the lowest since March 2021. However, ground beef prices in the U.S. hit a record high at $6.67 per pound, marking a 20.5% increase in the past year and a 72% increase since January 2020 when prices were approximately $3.88 per pound. This surge in beef prices is due to a historic cattle shortage, with U.S. cattle inventory plummeting to about 85 million head, the lowest since 1951. This is a significant drop from the peak of 130 million in 1975 and 10 million fewer than in 2020. As herd sizes decrease, beef prices rise.

data.title: Chemours surpassed Q4 earnings estimates by 150%, with EPS of $0.05 vs. $0.02 estimate. Revenue down $59M from last year.
data.description: Chemours (NYSE: CC) released its Q4 earnings on February 19, 2026, at 04:30 PM. The earnings report revealed that Chemours exceeded estimated earnings by 150.0%, posting an EPS of $0.05 compared to the estimated $0.02. Additionally, revenue saw a decrease of $59.00 million from the previous year. Looking back, in the last quarter, the company fell short on EPS. For a comprehensive read, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Consolidated Edison Q4 earnings exceed estimates with EPS of $0.89, beating by 4.71%. Revenue increases by $326 million.
data.description: Consolidated Edison (NYSE: ED) revealed its Q4 earnings report on Thursday, February 19, 2026, at 04:37 PM. The report exceeded expectations with an EPS of $0.89, surpassing the estimated $0.85 by 4.71%. Revenue also saw a significant increase, rising by $326.00 million compared to the previous year. In the preceding quarter, the company outperformed EPS estimates by $0.15, leading to a 1.58% increase. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: First Capital, Inc. (NASDAQ: FCAP) declares quarterly cash dividend of $0.31 per share, payable on March 27, 2026.
data.description: In Corydon, Indiana, on February 19, 2026, the Board of Directors of First Capital, Inc. (NASDAQ: FCAP) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.31 per share for common stock. Michael C. Frederick, President and CEO, confirmed this decision. The dividend is set to be distributed on March 27, 2026, to shareholders who are recorded as such by March 13, 2026.

data.title: Perseus Mining boosts Nyanzaga Project's ore reserves to 4.0 million ounces in Perth, WA.
data.description: In Perth, Western Australia, on February 20, 2026, Perseus Mining has announced an expansion in the ore reserves at the Nyanzaga Gold Project. The reserves now stand at 4.0 million ounces.

data.title: Perseus Mining announces a profit of US$185.5 million for H1 FY26 and boosts interim dividend by 100% to AUD 5.0 cents.
data.description: In the first half of the fiscal year 2026, Perth-based mining company Perseus Mining disclosed a noteworthy achievement with a reported profit after tax of US$185.5 million. Consequently, the company has decided to escalate its interim dividend by a significant margin of 100%, now standing at AUD 5.0 cents.

data.title: MFA Financial, Inc. declares dividends on Series B and Series C preferred stocks; 7.50% for Series B and 6.50% for Series C.
data.description: In New York, MFA Financial, Inc. stated today that its Board of Directors approved dividends for both its 7.50% Series B Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock (NYSE: MFA) and 6.50% Series C Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock. The company's Board of Directors declared a payout for the Series B Preferred Stock, following its terms, and the specifics for the Series C Preferred Stock remain undisclosed. The announcement ensures shareholders of the preferred stocks will receive their entitled dividend payments.
